name: quzijie-practice
description: 趣字节刷题全学科微信小程序与 408 客观题模拟

scripts.test: node tests/mock-core.test.js && node tests/gamification-core.test.js && node tests/practice-option-feedback.test.js && node tests/practice-navigation.test.js && node tests/global-practice-presentation.test.js && node tests/mine-presentation.test.js && node tests/question-answer-presentation.test.js && node tests/release-config.test.js && node tests/deployment-ops.test.js
scripts.verify:miniprogram: npm run validate:data && npm run audit:data && npm run check:js && npm run check:project && npm test
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify && npm run verify:server && npm run admin:build && npm run verify:migration && npm run verify:integration
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify:all && npm run check:release
